prompt: Implement minigit as described in SPEC-v1.txt using Ruby. The executable must be named 'minigit' and be runnable as ./minigit. For compiled languages, include a Makefile or build script. For interpreted languages, ensure the minigit file has a proper shebang line and is executable. Verify your implementation passes all tests by running: bash test-v1.sh
response:
```ruby
#!/usr/bin/env ruby

require 'digest'
require 'fileutils'

class MiniGit
  def initialize
    @git_dir = '.minigit'
  end

  def init
    if Dir.exist?(@git_dir)
      puts "Initialized empty minigit repository in #{Dir.pwd}/#{@git_dir}"
      return
    end

    Dir.mkdir(@git_dir)
    Dir.mkdir("#{@git_dir}/objects")
    File.write("#{@git_dir}/HEAD", "ref: refs/heads/main\n")
    puts "Initialized empty minigit repository in #{Dir.pwd}/#{@git_dir}"
  end

  def hash_object(file)
    content = File.read(file)
    header = "blob #{content.bytesize}\0"
    store = header + content
    sha1 = Digest::SHA1.hexdigest(store)
    
    dir = "#{@git_dir}/objects/#{sha1[0..1]}"
    FileUtils.mkdir_p(dir)
    File.write("#{dir}/#{sha1[2..-1]}", store)
    puts sha1
  end

  def cat_file(sha1)
    dir = "#{@git_dir}/objects/#{sha1[0..1]}"
    content = File.read("#{dir}/#{sha1[2..-1]}")
    header, body = content.split("\0", 2)
    print body
  end

  def update_index(file)
    index_path = "#{@git_dir}/index"
    entries = []

    if File.exist?(index_path)
      entries = Marshal.load(File.read(index_path))
    end

    if File.exist?(file)
      stat = File.stat(file)
      sha1 = hash_object_file(file)
      entry = {
        name: file,
        mode: stat.mode,
        mtime: stat.mtime.to_i,
        sha1: sha1
      }

      entries.delete_if { |e| e[:name] == file }
      entries << entry
    else
      entries.delete_if { |e| e[:name] == file }
    end

    File.write(index_path, Marshal.dump(entries))
  end

  def ls_files
    index_path = "#{@git_dir}/index"
    return unless File.exist?(index_path)

    entries = Marshal.load(File.read(index_path))
    entries.each do |entry|
      puts entry[:name]
    end
  end

  def write_tree
    index_path = "#{@git_dir}/index"
    return unless File.exist?(index_path)

    entries = Marshal.load(File.read(index_path))
    tree_content = entries.map do |entry|
      "#{entry[:mode].to_s(8)} #{entry[:name]}\0#{[entry[:sha1]].pack('H*')}"
    end.join

    header = "tree #{tree_content.bytesize}\0"
    store = header + tree_content
    sha1 = Digest::SHA1.hexdigest(store)

    dir = "#{@git_dir}/objects/#{sha1[0..1]}"
    FileUtils.mkdir_p(dir)
    File.write("#{dir}/#{sha1[2..-1]}", store)
    puts sha1
  end

  private

  def hash_object_file(file)
    content = File.read(file)
    header = "blob #{content.bytesize}\0"
    store = header + content
    Digest::SHA1.hexdigest(store)
  end
end

if __FILE__ == $0
  minigit = MiniGit.new

  case ARGV[0]
  when 'init'
    minigit.init
  when 'hash-object'
    minigit.hash_object(ARGV[1])
  when 'cat-file'
    minigit.cat_file(ARGV[1])
  when 'update-index'
    minigit.update_index(ARGV[1])
  when 'ls-files'
    minigit.ls_files
  when 'write-tree'
    minigit.write_tree
  else
    puts "Unknown command"
  end
end
```
